h1: About Us Improving People’s Quality of Life
h2: We Innovate High-Quality Solutions Across Our Business Areas
Our Innovative Products Save and Improve Lives
paragraphs: For over 60 years, BIOTRONIK has stood at the forefront of medical technology, pioneering breakthrough innovations that are transforming the lives of millions affected by heart disease and chronic pain.

Rooted in a deep purpose to seamlessly harmonize technology with the human body, we engineer trusted, life-changing therapies through our advanced active implants in Cardiac Rhythm Management, Monitoring, and Neuromodulation, while providing cutting-edge solutions in Electrophysiology.

Excellence for Life From creating Germany’s first pacemaker in 1963 to breaking new ground in digital technologies and Conduction System Pacing today, BIOTRONIK is continuously raising the bar for quality, performance, and innovation. Headquartered in Berlin, our global reach spans over 100 countries across the Americas, EMEA, and Asia—bringing bold, future-ready solutions that are shaping the next generation of medical technology.
We are committed to the highest quality, safety, and reliability. Our products are developed and produced in renowned centers of innovation in Germany, the US and Singapore.
Every day, our solutions impact the lives of patients by delivering intuitive and effective treatments that not only extend life but improve quality of living.
When choosing the right therapy, our customers appreciate the reliable and patient-centric technologies and services we offer.

Focusing on technologies that help the human heart to beat optimally, our CRM portfolio includes pacemakers, implantable defibrillators and leads, as well as external remote monitoring systems for patients with cardiac arrhythmias.
Electrophysiology Our solutions discover the essence of an arrhythmia for an individual patient treatment.

Neuromodulation With our spinal cord stimulation system, we aim to improve the care of patients with chronic intractable pain while reducing the burden on clinicians, caregivers, and patients in the US.

Micro Systems Technologies We provide a fully integrated vertical supply chain for the active implant industry, including ceramic substrates, substrate assembly, semiconductor packaging, primary batteries, and ceramic feedthroughs. In addition, we offer platform and system solutions that enable faster time-to-market.
